title: Optimise upto vector indexing
body:
From: #889

## Steps to reproduce the issue

```
module top (input clk, sel, di, output do);
        reg [0:1] data [0:0];
        always @(posedge clk)
                data[0] <= {di, data[0][0]};
        assign do = data[0][sel];
endmodule
```

`yosys -p synth_xilinx top.v`

## Expected behavior

```
     FDRE                            2
     LUT3                            1
```

## Actual behavior

```
     FDRE                            2
     LUT1                            1
     LUT5                            1
     MUXCY                           2
     XORCY                           3
```
